modules.name: shelley
documentation:
Combot Installer

A Python package that simplifies the installation process for Combot,
a terminal assistant. The package automates downloading and running
the installation script.

functions.name: shelley.installer.download_install_script
documentation: Download install.sh from GitHub if not present.

functions.name: shelley.installer.run_install_script
documentation: Detects the OS and runs the appropriate install script.

functions.name: shelley.__main__.main
documentation: Entry point for running the installer manually.
